Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast

Class SameTypeRewriter

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.SameTypeRewriter
All Implemented Interfaces:
ITypeCheckingRewriter
public class SameTypeRewriter extends Object implements ITypeCheckingRewriter
Perform a simple rewriting of formula where neither the language nor the types change. This class encapsulates instances of IFormulaRewriter provided by clients and ensures that the client returns well-typed formulas.
